mapper.select: SELECT AVG(l.isCorrect) * 100 FROM Learning_Logs l INNER JOIN Users u ON l.studentId = u.id INNER JOIN Classes c ON u.classId = c.id WHERE c.teacherId = #{teacherId}

SELECT a.classId AS classId, u.id AS id, u.fullName AS name, IFNULL(ap.progress, 0) AS progress FROM Users u JOIN Assignments a ON u.classId = a.classId LEFT JOIN Assignment_Progress ap ON u.id = ap.studentId AND a.id = ap.assignmentId WHERE u.role = 'student' AND (ap.progress < 100 OR ap.progress IS NULL) AND a.id IN
#{assignmentId}
